name: workflow state contract validator rejects a _resumable field that is not a boolean value
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1","_resumable":"maybe"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --check resumable 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'invalid__resumable=maybe' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
